hook: Regulation is not suppression; it is the skill of keeping your center while something important is happening.
body: You do not need to become numb to date well. You need enough steadiness to carry feeling without being run by it.

hook: Men often alternate between bottling emotion and spilling emotion because they were never taught the middle skill.
body: A regulated response can still be fully honest, interested, and alive.

hook: A regulated response can still be fully honest, interested, and alive.
body: You can care deeply about the outcome of a date while still acting in ways you respect regardless of the outcome.

body: Practice naming what you feel privately before deciding how much of it belongs in the interaction itself.
